'''Cal Majjer''' was the owner of the [[Dry Goods Emporium]] in [[Hedrett]]. He was generally a grumpy old man, and was used to getting his own way. He employed young [[Caarite]]s as stockboys, providing them with the work experience they would need to work for the [[Metatheran Cartel]]. He also employed [[Nyrkar]] the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] as his food preservation specialist and dietary consultant. Although Nyrkar was an employee, Majjer called him "my Wookiee".

In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], Nyrkar disappeared to join the [[Cularin resistance]]. Majjer then reported that several employees had disappeared, hoping that more people being missing would be more likely to get the [[Office of Peace and Security]]'s attention. He felt it didn't matter if the rest of his employees went missing, as Nyrkar was the one that really counted, his disappearance setting the company back thousands of credits.

==Appearances==
